title: Dosh
overview: Vikram Chopra is a respectable man. He has two sons, Vishant and Gaurav. Vishant is married to Priyanka, whom he neglects and instead spends all of his time with his friends. Taking advantage of the situation, Gaurav tries to get closer to Priyanka.

trailers.title: Inspector Om Investigates Vishant’s Truth | Dosh
